techtank.name: TechTank
techtank.description: Toronto's tech and startup community infrastructure I help run year-round

initiatives.name: Code Diversity
initiatives.tagline: Monthly coffee chats for women & gender-diverse folks in tech
initiatives.description: A recurring space designed to build connection and support among women and gender-diverse people in the Toronto tech community. We gather monthly to chat, share experiences, and build genuine relationships.

initiatives.name: Build Night TO
initiatives.tagline: Toronto is full of people building incredible things. This is a space to do it together.
initiatives.description: A brand new four-part series of building, collaboration, and community. Bring your existing project, startup idea, AI workflow, app, website, or side project. Or just your curiosity. Enjoy open build time, community demos, and meet fellow builders. Whether you're shipping code, designing a product, or exploring new tools, you'll be surrounded by ambitious people doing the same.

initiatives.name: Tech Talks
initiatives.tagline: Deep dives into tech topics & founder stories
initiatives.description: Bi-monthly talks featuring speakers from the Toronto tech community. We explore emerging technologies, share founder stories, and discuss the future of tech in Toronto.

girlsWithBigIdeas.name: Girls with Big Ideas
girlsWithBigIdeas.tagline: Space for early-stage founders to find cofounders
girlsWithBigIdeas.description: An event series for women and gender-diverse founders to connect with potential co-founders and build teams together.
